title: Fix indentation for `podman pod inspect`
body:
I fixed `podman inspect` in another PR, but it looks like `podman pod inspect` was also affected.

I did verify `podman network inspect` and `podman volume inspect` and both of those are still fine, though.

comments.body:

LGTM
APIv2 test failed, looks like a time out that might be a flake.

LGTM - you saved me the trouble of filing an issue, thanks (I'm in the process of writing tests for #8011). 

Flake is the now-usual "CI agent stopped responding!:; restarted.
